positive: A minimalist, stylized graphic design of a roaring celestial lion, depicted in a vibrant neon ink against a deep indigo midnight sky. The lion's mane and tail are abstract streaks of golden yellow and electric cyan, forming a powerful, symmetric silhouette. The composition is centered and bold, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Style: Modern Pop Art meets Art Deco geometry, clean line work, high contrast, flat colors with subtle gradients. Lighting: Dramatic, back-lit glow from internal cosmic energy. Perfect for direct-to-garment (DTG) print, vector quality, sharp edges.
negative: blur, artifacts, grain, noisy, text, watermark, signature, low quality, poor anatomy, bad limbs, messy, extra limbs, cluttered, cartoon, photorealism, logos, trademarks
